species: Two unrecognizable strains of the same bacterial species form a distinct colony boundary.
sample_source: M. xanthus DK1622 and its mutants were cultivated at 30 °C in liquid casitone tris medium (CTT) or on CTT plates supplemented with 1.5% agar.
strain: the M. xanthus DK1622 wild-type strain and the MXAN_0049-deletion mutant (ΔMXAN_0049)
